mapper.insert: insert into settlementlog (id, appId, product, card, accountType, bankName, bankNetName, accountName, accountCounter, account, faitAmount, uAmount, proof, status, createTime, finishTime, rate, operator, comment) values (null, #{appId},#{product},#{card},#{accountType},#{bankName},#{bankNetName},#{accountName}, #{accountCounter} , #{account}, #{faitAmount}, 0, '', 0, now(), null, 0, 0, #{comment})
mapper.select: select count(1) from settlementlog where account = #{account}
